release_body:
## Release Highlights

- Real-time chat streaming is now live, with smoother response updates and better final-answer presentation.
- Workspace experience was redesigned with a unified collapsible sidebar, dual resizable panes, and tighter chat/code/table/terminal flow.
- Built-in terminal support was significantly upgraded (persistent sessions, improved layout, and better stdout/stderr visibility).
- Analysis/runtime reliability improved: better DuckDB lock handling, safer kernel/resource teardown, and more stable table/artifact rendering.
- Artifact handling is more robust: duplicate artifact rows are prevented, and table/figure views recover better from missing/deleted artifacts.
- Agent responses are clearer for users, with stricter analytical-plan formatting and better explain-code structure.
- Desktop app polish: Inquira Dock icon sizing has been normalized so it no longer appears visually larger than neighboring app icons.
